name: ccfa-skills
description: CCFA CCF paper-project workflow skill family.

interface.longDescription: A governed 21-skill ccf-* family for CCF paper projects: idea, monitoring, literature, versioned environment and algorithm design/audit loops, experiments, publication visuals, writing, review, integrity, submission, rebuttal, and family maintenance.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the appropriate canonical ccf-* skill from CCFA Skills. Respect trigger boundaries, artifact contracts, venue-format routing, and renamed skill ownership.
